special_mechanics.name: R.O.B. Robot Control
special_mechanics.description: Game designed to be used with R.O.B. (Robotic Operating Buddy), a mechanized toy robot accessory with working arms. Robot performs actions based on game flashes and commands.

physics_values.note: Contemporary accounts describe robot motion as 'hysterically slow' and 'like watching grass grow'

tier_notes: Stack-Up is a puzzle game designed around R.O.B. robot interaction rather than traditional player character movement. Available sources contain developer credits and release information but no documented movement physics parameters. Game paradigm is 'other' (not traditional platformer). Exact ROM physics values not disclosed in sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Stack-Up article
